\tzpentry{ID4754}{Charge Tensor Coupling}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4754 introduces Charge Tensor Coupling as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\hat{\\mathcal{Q}}_{gp} = \\text{Tr} \\left[ \\mathbf{F}_{\\mu\\nu} \\mathbf{F}^{\\mu\\nu} \\right] \\otimes \\exp \\left( -\\frac{T_c}{T(\\ManifoldL)} \\right) \\implies \\text{SU(3)}_{\\text{color}} \\text{ Pinning}\n\\end{equation}
